related_internal_prs.note: Original /stop <UUID> ask — already shipped, reused as the UUID branch of the new dispatcher.
Original chat-pause /stop. The URL/UUID branches must run BEFORE its forwarded/reply rejection.
Per-tool queues and SolveQueue.cancel(id) — reused unchanged.

external_references.note: $ --stop <uuid> contract that this feature depends on.
Telegram Bot API Message object — reply_to_message and caption fields used by extractStopTarget.
RFC 4122 v4 UUID format used for session IDs (already enforced by extractSessionIdFromText).
